text.title: django-constants Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-field enum kind + per-limit centralisation routing.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this field have a small, fixed, named set of allowed values?

branch.conclusion: Not an enum. Free-text CharField or BooleanField as appropriate.

branch.question: Is the column on a hot path AND the table has millions of rows AND storage cost matters?

branch.conclusion: IntegerChoices. Document rationale in the spec; this choice is permanent (cannot be changed retroactively).
TextChoices. Default; readable in admin, migrations, logs.

branch.question: Is the literal referenced in more than one file?

branch.conclusion: Move to constants.py as UPPER_SNAKE_CASE with rationale.
Keep inline. Single-call-site magic numbers are tolerable.

text.example: field=Order.status, four values, low-traffic admin table q-fixed-set -> true q-storage-critical -> false => conclusion r1: TextChoices.
